全球领先半导体公司

上海 500-2000人 电子/通信/硬件 未融资

企业介绍

Infineon Technologies AG, Neubiberg, Germany, offers semiconductor and system solutions addressing three central challenges to modern society: energy efficiency, mobility and security. In 2018 fiscal year (ending September 30), the Company reported the revenue achieved EUR7.6 billion.

英飞凌科技股份有限公司总部位于德国纽必堡，致力于为现代社会的三大科技挑战领域-高能效、移动性和安全性提供先进的半导体产品与系统解决方案。2018财年（截止到2018年9月30日），英飞凌营业额达76亿欧元。

Infineon has built up a comprehensive industry chain in China, covering Research & Design, Sales & Marketing and Manufacturing Sectors. In Shanghai and Beijing, Infineon has its R&D centers, involved in global research projects. In Wuxi, Infineon’s largest backend manufacturing factory in China produces the high-quality discretes, chipcard and high power semiconductors for both Chinese and global markets. In Beijing, the business is engaged in IGBT assembly. Also, Infineon has sales and marketing offices in Beijing, Shanghai, Shenzhen and Hongkong. Meanwhile, we have long lasting cooperation with China top universities and companies in terms of Sales, Technology Research and Talent Development.  
英飞凌在中国建立了涵盖研发、销售及市场、生产、技术支持等在内的完整的产业链。在研发方面，英飞凌在上海、北京建立了应用研发中心，利用国内的人才资源，参与全球的重点项目研究；在无锡的后道生产工厂，为中国及全球其他市场生产先进的分立器件、智能卡芯片和功率半导体产品；在北京的子公司主要从事IGBT组件的生产；并以北京、上海、深圳和香港为中心在国内建立了全面的销售及市场网络。同时，我们在销售、技术研发、人才培养等方面与国内领先高等院校及企业开展了深入的合作。

Infineon Greater China has been officially recognized as the Great Place to Work for in 2018. It is the second time since 2016 that we received this honor, which makes us the business in the semiconductor industry that has won this award twice. The award not only shows the industry's high recognition of Infineon's talent development philosophy and practice but also reflects the employees’ confidence and support for Infineon.

英飞凌科技大中华区凭借着令员工引以为傲的创新产品与技术、专业系统的职业发展体系、以人为本的工作文化和氛围从超过150家本土和跨国企业中脱颖而出，荣膺“2018年大中华区\*\*\*职场”殊荣。这是继2016年之后，英飞凌再获此项荣誉，也是一家两度获得这一殊荣的半导体企业，彰显了业界对于英飞凌人才发展理念及实践的高度认可，同时也体现了员工对公司的信任与支持。

With the rapid business expansion in China, we sincerely invite high committed and career-oriented talents to join and grow with us. We do believe great minds think alike.  
随着英飞凌的业务在中国的迅速增长，我们诚邀您的加入与我们共同迎接挑战，见证英飞凌的成长。

# Start your career at Infineon

#### #WeAreIn for driving decarbonization and digitalization. Are you in?

[Start job search](https://jobs.infineon.com/careers)

![Image 3: Start your career at Infineon](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-hq-group-meeting.jpg:asset-680-2x1?qlt=55,0&resMode=sharp2&op_usm=1.75,0.3,2,0)

## [Join a world leader in semiconductor solutions](https://www.infineon.com/careers)

Our semiconductor solutions are at the forefront of the digital revolution, shaping a more connected and environmentally sustainable world. Together, with more than 57,000 people from over 100 countries, we are not just shaping the future, we are redefining it.

We engineer innovative products, while caring for our people and empowering them to reach ambitious goals. We offer work-life balance, long term growth and a supportive environment where individuality is celebrated.

Our employees are the cornerstone of our success. It is through their combined efforts that we can share the stories of the innovative minds behind our achievements.#WeAreIn. Are you in?

## [Shape your career in Powering AI](https://www.infineon.com/careers)

At Infineon, **we power AI from the grid to the core** – enabling an efficient, reliable, and sustainable energy flow today and in the future. With our comprehensive semiconductor portfolio combining Si, SiC, and GaN technologies, we redefine the entire power flow within and beyond AI data centers.Join us in driving the future of Powering AI– and help shape the technologies that make tomorrow’s intelligence possible.

[Learn more](https://www.infineon.com/careers/teams/powering-ai)

![Image 4:   ](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-munich-professionals-working-laptops.jpg?wid=1400)

## [Opportunities for professionals](https://www.infineon.com/careers)

You are an experienced professional and looking for a new job opportunity? Join a high-tech company and drive the future of technology with us. Discover jobs in our various functions.

[Find your team](https://www.infineon.com/careers/teams)

## [Opportunities for early career talents](https://www.infineon.com/careers)

There are several ways to become part of our international team. Join us as a trainee, (PhD) student, university graduate, apprentice or dual student. Or simply apply for a position directly. You bring your fresh ideas, your enthusiasm, and your skills. We’ll make sure you learn what you need on the job and have ample opportunity to develop your expertise.

[Learn more](https://www.infineon.com/careers/students-graduates)

![Image 7: EVP Dresden students](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/lowres-evp-dresden-student-walking.jpg?wid=1400)

## Where you belong

### [Jobs that matter](https://www.infineon.com/careers)

Our tiny chips play a substantial role in powering everything, from the smartphones we use, to the cars we drive, the renewable energy sources we rely on, and the secure transactions we make. At Infineon, you have the opportunity to contribute to a brighter future. Join us in making people’s lives easier, safer, and greener and build a better tomorrow.

![Image 10: Sustainability](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-image-career-home-kulim-3-students-walking.jpg?wid=1400)

![Image 11: Sustainability](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-image-career-home-kulim-3-students-walking.jpg?wid=1000)

![Image 12: Sustainability](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-image-career-home-kulim-3-students-walking.jpg?wid=600)

### [Work alongside tech experts](https://www.infineon.com/careers)

Our team members are committed to innovation that drives customer success. We share a passion for excellence and push boundaries through our cutting-edge technologies shaping the future. Your enthusiasm for technology and innovation, as well as your expertise and fresh ideas, are valued at Infineon.

![Image 13: Reinraum Villach](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-image-career-home.jpg?wid=1400)

![Image 14: Reinraum Villach](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-image-career-home.jpg?wid=1000)

![Image 15: Reinraum Villach](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-image-career-home.jpg?wid=600)

### [Experience growth and well-being](https://www.infineon.com/careers)

Our people are at the heart of everything we do. We put as much passion into designing our work environments as we do our products. Enjoy flexible work options that accommodate your lifestyle and long-term career paths where you can grow your skills – all with a focus on your health and family.

![Image 16: Compass](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-kulim-professional-discussion.jpg?wid=1400)

![Image 17: Compass](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-kulim-professional-discussion.jpg?wid=1000)

![Image 18: Compass](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-kulim-professional-discussion.jpg?wid=600)

### [Where you belong](https://www.infineon.com/careers)

We create the best Infineon for everyone by embracing each other’s unique perspectives and talents worldwide. Our collaborative, open door culture defines the way we work. We are a team that cares for each other, where managers are approachable, and you are encouraged to be yourself.

![Image 19: Corporate Citizenship](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-image-career-home-hq-professional-meeting.jpg?wid=1400)

![Image 20: Corporate Citizenship](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-image-career-home-hq-professional-meeting.jpg?wid=1000)

![Image 21: Corporate Citizenship](https://assets.infineon.com/is/image/infineon/evp-image-career-home-hq-professional-meeting.jpg?wid=600)

### 公司簡介

About Infineon Infineon Technologies AG, Neubiberg, Germany, offers semiconductor and system solutions addressing three central challenges to modern society: energy efficiency, mobility, and security. In the 2010 fiscal year (ending September 30), the company reported sales of Euro 3.295 billion with approximately 26,650 employees worldwide. With a global presence, Infineon operates through its subsidiaries in the U.S. from Milpitas, CA, in the Asia-Pacific region from Singapore, and in Japan from Tokyo. Infineon is listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange (ticker symbol: IFX) and in the USA on the over-the-counter market OTCQX International Premier (ticker symbol: IFNNY). Infineon Greater China has been officially recognized as the Great Place to Work for in 2018. It is the second time since 2016 that we received this honor, which makes us the only company in the semiconductor industry that has won this award twice. The award not only shows the industry's high recognition of Infineon's talent development philosophy and practice but also reflects the employees’ confidence and support for Infineon. 「響應參與【 青年就業大作戰 】 徵才計畫」，計畫代碼： 2022YBKCGPLAN

## 主要商品 / 服務項目

Our global team, with over 29.500 employees, works to improve energy efficiency, enables new mobility concepts and provides for security in our digital age. With our innovative semiconductors and system solutions we contribute to a more sustainable future.

## 福利制度

【員工福利】 1. 十三個月年薪與績效獎金 2. 生日禮券與各式禮金 3. 員工推薦獎金：鼓勵員工推薦優秀人才，成功推薦後將獲得獎金。 4. 創新獎金：對於有發明及成功申請專利的員工，公司提供特別獎金，以鼓勵創新。 5. 豐厚年假與彈性休假：我們提供充足的年假和彈性的休假安排，幫助員工在工作與生活之間取得平衡。 6. 產假福利：提供優渥的產假，支持員工在成為父母的過程中享有充分的時間照顧家庭。 7. 團體保險：公司為員工及其家屬提供全面的團體保險計劃，保障健康與安全。 8. 健康檢查補助：每年補助員工進行健康檢查，關注員工的身體健康。 9. 彈性工時與遠距辦公：提供靈活的工作時間安排及每月固定比例的遠距辦公選項，讓員工能更好地兼顧工作與生活。 10. 員工協助方案：為員工提供心理、法律及財務等方面的支持與諮詢服務。 11. 友善職場：我們推行人性化管理，強調多元包容與尊重，營造一個和諧且支持性的工作環境。 12. 舒適的辦公空間：辦公配有人體工學座椅，並提供免費的咖啡、牛奶與豆漿，並附有員工休憩設施與哺乳室 【教育訓練】 Training & Development 1. 多樣化的職涯跑道：提供多樣化的職業發展機會，讓員工能根據興趣和目標選擇合適的成長路徑。 2. 各部門專屬學習平台：每個部門都有專屬的學習資源，以滿足其特定需求。 4. LinkedIn Learning 海量學習資源：員工可訪問LinkedIn Learning平台，進行多元化學習。 5. 各式工具以及線上教學影片：我們提供多種學習工具和線上教學影片，方便員工隨時學習。 6. 針對各職階與職涯的學習路線：設計針對不同職階和職涯發展的學習路線，滿足各階段需求。 7. 全方位新人到職訓練：為新進員工提供全面的入職培訓，幫助迅速融入工作環境。 8. 線上真人英文學習平台：提供線上真人英語學習平台，提升員工的國際業務溝通能力。

• Provide pre-sales and post-sales support including customer presentation. • Understand customer requirements, and deliver technical presentations, reports, documents, and technology demonstrations. • Familiar with MCU firmware development, assist customer on both SW and HW verification & debugging • Support customer product development and design of SPI/I2C driver, software stack, and application for Security product – TPM, Java card and authentication etc. • Support customer issue analysis and resolution. • Develop test scripts to assist in customer system debug and issue resolution • Collaborate with internal Sales and Marketing teams to support design-in activities across a wide range of customers, including Tier 1 and OEMs, with the goal of maximizing the inclusion of Infineon products in customers’ BOMs for IoT applications.
